name: Moving Checklist Generator
description: Generate comprehensive moving checklists and timelines

agents.name: Moving Planner
agents.purpose: Create a detailed moving plan and checklist
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a comprehensive moving checklist organized by timeline: 8 weeks before, 6 weeks, 4 weeks, 2 weeks, 1 week, moving day, and after move. Include: admin tasks, packing strategy by room, utilities to transfer, address changes, cleaning tasks, and budget tracker.

suggestion_card.title: Moving Checklist
suggestion_card.subtitle: Plan your move step by step
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Create a moving checklist for [move date]

author: agentfactory
